lastFailureMessage:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Model>
  <!--INIT-->
  <Command Name="init" IsBranch="false" ClrType="Ivy.Console.Init.InitCommand" 
Settings="Ivy.Console.Init.InitCommand+Settings">
    <Description>Create a new Ivy project.</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Option Short="" Long="dangerous-clear" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Clear the current folder before creating the new 
project.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="n" Long="namespace" Value="NAMESPACE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>The namespace for the new Ivy project.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="verbose" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Enable verbose output</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
  </Command>
  <!--DB-->
  <Command Name="db" IsBranch="true" 
Settings="Spectre.Console.Cli.CommandSettings">
    <Description>Manage database providers</Description>
    <!--ADD-->
    <Command Name="add" IsBranch="false" ClrType="Ivy.Console.Db.DbAddCommand" 
Settings="Ivy.Console.Db.DbAddCommand+Settings">
      <Description>Add a database provider to your Ivy project.</Description>
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="v" Long="verbose" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Enable verbose output</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
    </Command>
  </Command>
  <!--AUTH-->
  <Command Name="auth" IsBranch="true" 
Settings="Spectre.Console.Cli.CommandSettings">
    <Description>Manage auth providers</Description>
    <!--ADD-->
    <Command Name="add" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Ivy.Console.Auth.AuthAddCommand" 
Settings="Spectre.Console.Cli.EmptyCommandSettings">
      <Description>Add a auth provider</Description>
    </Command>
  </Command>
  <!--OPENAPI-->
  <Command Name="openapi" IsBranch="true" 
Settings="Spectre.Console.Cli.CommandSettings">
    <Description>Manage OpenApi connections</Description>
    <!--ADD-->
    <Command Name="add" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Ivy.Console.OpenApi.OpenApiAddCommand" 
Settings="Ivy.Console.OpenApi.OpenApiAddCommand+Settings">
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="" Long="verbose" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Enable verbose output</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
    </Command>
  </Command>
  <!--AGENT-->
  <Command Name="agent" IsBranch="true" 
Settings="Spectre.Console.Cli.CommandSettings">
    <Description>Create or modify an Ivy app using the Ivy agent</Description>
    <!--CREATE-->
    <Command Name="create" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Ivy.Console.Agent.AgentCreateCommand" 
Settings="Ivy.Console.Agent.AgentCreateCommand+Settings">
      <Description>Create an new Ivy app using the Ivy agent</Description>
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="" Long="from-models" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Select models to create app from</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="llm-seed" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.Int32">
          <Description>Seed for the LLM</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="model" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Model to create app from</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="p" Long="prompt" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Prompt for the agent</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="v" Long="verbose" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Enable verbose output</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
    </Command>
  </Command>
  <!--DEPLOY-->
  <Command Name="deploy" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Ivy.Console.Deploy.DeployCommand" 
Settings="Ivy.Console.Deploy.DeployCommand+Settings">
    <Description>Deploy Ivy project</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Option Short="v" Long="verbose" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag"
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Enable verbose output</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
  </Command>
  <!--DOCS-->
  <Command Name="docs" IsBranch="false" ClrType="Ivy.Console.DocsCommand" 
Settings="Spectre.Console.Cli.EmptyCommandSettings">
    <Description>Open documentation</Description>
  </Command>
  <!--SAMPLES-->
  <Command Name="samples" IsBranch="false" ClrType="Ivy.Console.SamplesCommand" 
Settings="Spectre.Console.Cli.EmptyCommandSettings">
    <Description>Open samples</Description>
  </Command>
  <!--VERSION-->
  <Command Name="version" IsBranch="false" ClrType="Ivy.Console.VersionCommand" 
Settings="Spectre.Console.Cli.EmptyCommandSettings">
    <Description>Show Ivy version</Description>
  </Command>
</Model>Error: The given key was not present in the dictionary.
